title: Lost Frontiers
description: Explore a beautiful and lively world. Forge 1.20.1.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/806ed03dc3987a95f9a8e82be5d949e64801ee44.jpeg)
A modpack focused on creating a beautiful lively world.
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1259195408022769746?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=blue&label=Discord&color=blue)](https://discord.gg/CYXbFCAFFc)

About

Lost Frontiers is a modpack for Forge 1.20.1 with a focus on creating a visually appealing and lively world to explore. Lost Frontiers contains mods adding new flora, fauna, a serene landscape, and many different gameplay additions and quality-of-life enhancements, such as:

- **Vehicles:** Craft planes, airships, and boats; Explore the world in a new fashion. - **Vanilla+ Content:** New building blocks, decor, world additions, mobs, farming, and many more enhancements and additions that keep a vanilla feel. - **Dynamic and Lively Surroundings:** Watch trees grow in real-time, leaves fall and pile up, and experience an overall entirely new ambiance while you play. The world comes alive even more in an enhanced third person mode, see new player animations and new fluid mob animations. - **Performance:** Many performance mods are included for the smoothest gameplay. And more!
---

Notes

> 💬 The Lost Frontiers Community Server is in the server list by default. Feel free to join! > 📷 Screenshots taken with [Super Duper Vanilla Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/super-duper-vanilla-shaders) ---

Modpack Performance

Tested on a Ryzen 5 1600, 32GB DDR4 Ram (4 allocated to Minecraft), and a GTX 1660Ti 6GB:
Performance 16 Render Distance, 5 Simulation Distance with [Super Duper Vanilla Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/super-duper-vanilla-shaders): ![fpsshaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d77edd1e379d61557f6b1b6de3ff481e7495c61.png) 24 Render Distance, 12 Simulation Distance, No Shaders: ![noshaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8559a63a1893a81a2574587f0d7ba1cc482c71bc.png)
---
